rationale: Large clear human IBD longitudinal cohort, CD/UC/control, 118 people / 555 samples. Fills major microbiome gap.
manual_review_blockers: Verify publication/PMID and whether any overlap with HMP2/PRISM.

rationale: High-value pediatric RISK Crohn methylation cohort, 402 samples, diagnosis/follow-up.
manual_review_blockers: RISK family overlap with existing transcriptomic rows should be checked; count once if same subject family appears elsewhere.

rationale: Strong paired serum/fecal Crohn flare metabolomics; public record indicates CD/control and prediction/validation structure.
manual_review_blockers: Treat serum and feces as one row/family, not two independent cohorts.

expected_registry_row_shape: repository=Metabolomics Workbench; sample_type=feces likely, verify; study_family=SOURCE_Crohn_diet_omics; countability=countable_independent
rationale: SOURCE cohort is human CD/control and explicitly non-transcriptomic diet/microbiome/metabolomics context.
manual_review_blockers: Confirm exact sample type and whether associated microbiome accession should be co-listed.

rationale: Recent public human stool metagenomics for newly diagnosed treatment-naive IBD with CD/UC/indeterminate/control metadata.

rationale: Human Crohn/control shotgun metagenomics around exclusive enteral nutrition, distinct from HMP2/PRISM.

rationale: Clear human pediatric IBD proteomics with treatment-response biology; PMID/DOI available.

rationale: Direct human UC/healthy stool metaproteomics; strong missing metaproteomics row.

rationale: Large human CD/UC/control EPIC saliva methylation set, public 2025, not in registry.

rationale: Human IBD stool before/after biologics; good therapy-response non-transcriptomic complement.

rationale: Clean human Crohn/control blood methylation dataset with raw IDATs.
